title: indigofera scabrida
intro: Indigofera scabrida, also known as the prickly-leaved indigo, is a flowering plant species in the legume family. It is a shrub with prickly leaves and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and prevent infection. Indigofera scabrida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
